academic-writer.description: Drafts and revises political science writing with strict source-grounding and KKV-style inferential discipline.

reviewer-2.description: Pressure-tests political science writing like a severe top-journal reviewer who flags anything weak, vague, or inferentially sloppy.

paper-architect.description: Designs article structure, LaTeX assembly logic, and manuscript-level coherence for KKV-style political science papers.

literature-finder.description: Retrieves and organizes project-local literature artifacts before interpretation or synthesis.

literature-review.description: Finds, retrieves, reads, and synthesizes academic literature with browser automation, explicit source-grounding, and full-text preference.

theory-hypotheses.description: Builds theoretical stance, mechanisms, rival explanations, and disciplined hypotheses from source-grounded literature.

data-methods.description: Writes transparent KKV-style data and methods sections and supports empirical workflows in Python.

ggplot-visualizer.description: Produces grayscale publication-ready ggplot figures, captions, and figure code guidance.

dataviz-editor.description: Designs the paper-level visualization strategy and ensures figure diversity and narrative fit.

results-writer.description: Turns tables, figures, and model output into disciplined political science results prose.

discussion-limitations.description: Writes calibrated discussion and highly transparent limitations for scientific articles.

conclusion-writer.description: Writes compact, thoughtful, high-payoff conclusions for political science articles.
